VIX Futures - Individual Market Analysis
← Back to dashboard

VIX Futures - Individual Market Analysis

CoT signals and diagnostics for VIX futures.

As of 2026-03-10

Gemini Summary

Signal Summary:

  • Configuration statement: Given a Speculator Z-score of 0.255, a Hedger Z-score of -0.254, and sustained 4-week flows of 6.4, this setup aligns with Upward-biased price paths and Normal volatility, where the dominant risk is Mean reversion, not Trend continuation. (1)
  • The signal has transitioned into a "Normal" synthetic state, characterized by a Balanced_Long_Bias regime as speculators aggressively reduce net-short exposure. (1)
  • Conviction Band: Medium; Interpretation Confidence: High Confidence; Internal Conflict Flag: No. Signal Stability Assessment: Improving; Threshold Proximity: Far; Revision Sensitivity: Unknown.

Methodology Applied:

  • Speculator Z-scores between +/- 2.0 define a neutral regime; current levels (0.255) indicate a lack of positioning crowding. (1)
  • Positioning flow is analyzed over a 4-week rolling window to identify conviction shifts. (1)
  • VIX Futures - CBOE Futures Exchange, latest observation: 2026-03-10. (1)

Key Dynamics:

  • The primary driver is a multi-week "Long_Build" flow (+6.4), which has moved Speculator Net %OI from -22.9% in mid-January to -11.1% currently. (1)
  • This reflects a steady stabilization of market structure, as the previous "High Tension" state (Z-scores < -1.0) has normalized. (1)
  • Conditional Invalidation: A reversal in flow strength becoming negative while Spec Net %OI remains short, indicating a return to complacency. (1)

Scenario Balance:

  • Base case dominant: Continued mean reversion toward zero net positioning as extreme short-volatility bets are unwound.
  • Upside risk: A volatility spike triggered by exogenous shocks, finding high convexity due to the lack of long crowding.
  • Downside risk: A return to extreme short crowding if speculative flows flip to aggressive "Short_Build."

Time Horizon & Aggregation:

  • Time Horizon: Tactical (weeks). Flow dynamics currently dominate the 1-month outlook.
  • Aggregation Weight Hint: Medium. The neutral state acts as a "multiplier-neutral" baseline for broader cross-asset risk-on/off aggregates.

Macro Relevance:

  • Informs systemic fragility and convexity demand. (1)
  • Economic mechanism: Speculators are adding tail-risk protection (long VIX), implying a reduction in market complacency. (1)
  • Cycle position: Not determined.

Regime Context:

  • The signal is in a newly entered "Normal" regime following a 5-week transition from "High Tension." (1)
  • Direction of change: Stabilising.

Model Limitations:

  • Weekly CoT reporting lag may mask intra-week volatility spikes or rapid flow reversals. (1)

Data & References:

  • VIX Futures - CBOE Futures Exchange (2026-03-10). (1)
  • Most influential: 4-week flow (6.4) and Speculator Z-score (0.255). (1)
  • Spot VIX price and equity market realized volatility would improve reliability. (1)

VIX Futures CoT Diagnostics Chart

VIX futures: CoT diagnostics, positioning, crowding, reversal risk, and price overlay.
